stations.name: Garden City busway interchange (busway only, no train)
stations.walk_minutes_note: Major bus interchange within the suburb.

buses.note: Bus routes serve Upper Mount Gravatt via Logan Road and the South-East Busway. Garden City is a major interchange.

driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 18 to 22 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Westfield Garden City is one of the largest shopping centres in Brisbane and sits within Upper Mount Gravatt.

pockets.name: Garden City precinct
pockets.character: Streets close to Westfield Garden City and the busway interchange.

pockets.name: Family streets
pockets.character: Established family-home stock with catchment access.

buyer_profile.note: Catchment, larger blocks, and shopping centre amenity.
Buyers prioritising amenity and parking over inner-CBD walkability.
